task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application is open and the title bar or Xsheet/Timeline indicates 'dwanko_run.tnz' is loaded. The character animation should be visible in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: Import the background image into the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'background_sky.png' is visible in the OpenToonz file browser, Level Strip, or loaded into a column in the Xsheet/Timeline.

task_completion.description: Arrange the background behind the character animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Xsheet, the background column is placed to the left of the character column (or lower in the Timeline layers), and the main viewer shows the character rendering in front of the blue-to-green gradient background.

task_completion.description: Expose the background for the duration of the animation (at least 10 frames).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Xsheet or Timeline, the cell containing the background image is dragged down or extended to cover at least 10 frames, running parallel to the character animation frames.

task_completion.description: Set the render output path and format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' dialog in OpenToonz is open, showing the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/composite/' (or similar relative path) and the file format set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: Render the final composite as a PNG sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rendering progress bar/window is visible in OpenToonz, or a file manager terminal shows multiple rendered PNG files in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/composite/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz graphical interface to perform the compositing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenToonz UI (Xsheet, viewer, menus) rather than terminal commands using ImageMagick, FFmpeg, or Python scripts to composite the images.

integrity.description: The agent actually rendered the sequence from OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render dialog or output settings are visible, confirming the software generated the output, rather than the agent copying pre-existing files.

integrity.description: The agent used the specific generated background image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The background visible in the viewer is a gradient from sky blue at the top to forest green at the bottom, matching the generated 'background_sky.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Scene path: /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. Background path: /home/ga/OpenToonz/assets/background_sky.png. Output directory: /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/composite. The background is a synthetic gradient from sky blue (top) to forest green (bottom). The animation must be rendered for at least 10 frames as a PNG sequence. Verify that the character is correctly composited IN FRONT OF the background (character visible, not obscured by the sky).
